name: China Senior Living Industry International Holding Corporation
summary: China Senior Living Industry International Holding Corporation operates senior living facilities in Xianyang, the People's Republic of China. It provides healthcare, medical staff, meal preparation, and general care services for the elderly. The company was formerly known as China Forestry, Inc. and changed its name to China Senior Living Industry International Holding Corporation in September 2015. China Senior Living Industry International Holding Corporation was incorporated in 1986 and is based in Xianyang, the People's Republic of China.
